title: How Checkout works
excerpt: Learn how to use Checkout to collect payments on your website. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/how-checkout-works.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/how-checkout-works.md?payment-ui=embedded-page) - [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/how-checkout-works.md?payment-ui=checkout-form) - [Elements](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/how-checkout-works.md?payment-ui=checkout-elements)
